title: Chandu Champion
desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Chandu Champion
desc: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Commando - A One Man Army
desc: Caught in the diplomatic crossfire between India and China, Captain Karan Dogra fights a harrowing battle for survival and makes a new enemy by rescuing a damsel in distress.

title: Sky Force
desc: Brave heroes embark on a quest for truth as India and Pakistan enter an airstrike war that threatens to pose deadly consequences.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
desc: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Aitraaz
desc: When a company chairman's trophy wife stirs up a storm in a happily married employee's life, the tumultuous winds drag all of them into an intense courtroom showdown.

title: Jai Ho
desc: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

title: Singh Is Kinng
desc: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

title: The Dunes
desc: A devoted domestic counselor fights to stop his ex-wife from moving the country with their son and her new partner, risking everything to prevent relocation altogether.

title: Chakravyuh
desc: Kabir infiltrates a Maoist organisation to help Adil Khan, who is a police officer and his friend.

title: Satyaprem Ki Katha
desc: Satyaprem tries hard to prove himself as a worthy person and restore the faith in the love of Khata, who is overwhelmed by her breakup.

title: Lingaa
desc: Lingaa, a petty thief, turns over a new leaf after realising the role his grandfather has played in building a dam for the villagers. He then dedicates his life to saving it from a corrupt minister.

title: Sirf Tum
desc: Deepak and Aarti fall in love with each other without ever meeting each other. Later, Aarti sets out to look for him in the city of Delhi.

title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
desc: A young man, who lives happily with his family but is scared of ghosts, visits Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with his family. There, he is soon possessed by a vengeful ghost with a sinister past.

title: Commando 3
desc: Commando Karan Singh Dogra and Inspector Bhavna Reddy race against time to thwart a terrorist attack on India. Later, they realise that foiling mastermind Buraq's plan is harder than it seems.

title: Biwi No. 1
desc: Two adorable kids, a quirky mother-in-law and a happy-go-lucky friend help a heartbroken wife bring a straying husband back from the other woman's tangled embrace.

title: Baaghi
desc: Raja loves Rani, but she commits suicide after falling prey to Manmohan, who wants her at any cost. A devastated Raja turns to the world of crime and becomes a professional killer.
